comment: Read passage specs (PLAN2 §3.6). 60 text-only passages, 10 styles x 6 (validator caps any style at 8), tiers 0-3 aligned with the concept-graph tiers (t0 x8, t1 x18, t2 x20, t3 x14 — fewer at the bootstrap tier where 60+ words of tier-0 grammar gets stilted). gen_read.py holds the per-style register briefs and per-tier word/grammar dials. Titles are display French; topics steer generation.

passages.title: Travaux sur la ligne 13
passages.topic: Métro line 13 closes this weekend for track works; replacement buses, annoyed riders quoted, normal service Monday

passages.title: Canicule en vue
passages.topic: A heatwave is forecast for the week; the city keeps parks open late and gives simple advice to residents
